headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -86.6)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 144% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 169 quotes and an exceptionally high strong-intensity count (141 of 169), driving the score to 88.4 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This puts frustrations near the top of their 172-day range (high of 169.8), while fears and optimism both sit in negative territory, suggesting a broadly disengaged or unhappy audience.
• Frustrations nearly doubled from yesterday's 43.3, a sharp single-day spike largely fuelled by the surge in strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
